chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 1032 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 10149/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 10150/16 4. For hearing. 06.12.2016. Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio, Advocate, Advocate alongwith applicant/accused. -.-.-. 1&3. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 4. Applicant/accused is present alongwith his Counsel. It is contended, inter alia, that the reason for filing the protective bail has arisen owing to the fact that Non-Bailable Warrants have been issued against the present applicant/accused in Crime No. 108 of 2016 of P.S Phuleli, Hyderabad. He further contends that this Court has already granted protective bail to the co-accused in Criminal Bail Application No.S-1022 of 2016 and he also prays that the present applicant/accused may be granted protection enabling him to appear and surrender before the learned Sessions Court, Hyderabad. Without touching upon the merits of the case, present applicant/accused is granted protective bail for a period of seven days commencing from today, subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This protective bail order shall cease to have effect on 12.12.2016 after Court hours. NBW issued against the applicant shall remain suspended in the intervening period. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE
